title: TextFrame
text: TextFrame Set the type of border for editable Unifields. TextFrame = None | Plain | Etched | Bevelled | Shaded Default value Etched File section [upi] Arguments None —no border Plain —narrow black line Etched —makes the field appear sunken Bevelled —makes the field appear raised Shaded —more native shading effect Description Editable Unifields fields can optionally have a border, which can make components more attractive. Etched and Bevelled work best when the background of the component is not white or dark gray, because these are the colors used to draw the frame. On a white background, Shaded looks quite attractive. Unifieds that are not editable do not have a border. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
